author: lOrm
content: Plan: Category A — root-cause. Replace Command::new('kill') PATH lookups with direct libc kill()/killpg() syscalls. libc is already a unix-target dependency in Cargo.toml. Use libc::kill() and libc::SIGTERM/SIGKILL. For kill -0 existence check, also use libc::kill(pid, 0). Propagate errors.
